name: remo-code
description: Remo-backed context bridge for Codex and Claude

scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @remo-code/sdk --filter @remo-code/adapters build && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run lint
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @remo-code/sdk --filter @remo-code/adapters build && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck
